message:
chore: vendor uring-fs to work around panic-on-read in release builds

Add local path override for uring-fs to avoid a panic-on-read bug in
uring-fs 1.4.0 when built with panic=abort in release profile. The
vendored copy in vendor/uring-fs contains the hotfix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
